identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a visceral, gold-and-black luxury experience that feels expensive, celebratory, and bold.

theme.name: Midnight Gold Celebration
theme.strategy: High Contrast Luxury. Deep blacks provide the stage; Gold provides the performance.

hero.structure: Full-screen height, centralized or split layout.
hero.visuals: Gradient overlay on car fleet image. Gold text floating over dark background.
hero.cta: Solid Gold button, Black text, Hover: White bg/Black text

cards.style: Glassmorphism or Solid Dark Grey with Gold Border (1px).

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD700] text-black hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.secondary: border border-[#FFD700] text-[#FFD700] hover:bg-[#FFD700] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none

floating_whatsapp.style: bg-green-500 text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 animate-bounce-slow

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`
Configure Tailwind with the Gold/Black palette in `tailwind.config.js`.
Use `Oswald` for headings and `Manrope` for body text. Add them via Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement smooth scrolling for navigation links.
Create a sticky Navbar that blurs the background.
The Hero section MUST use the `hero_image` with a dark gradient overlay so white/gold text pops.
For 'Celebration Drive', use the `celebration_image` on one side and text on the other. Use gold accents.
For 'Lease Your Car', use `lease_image` (coins) and `lease_person` to symbolize wealth.
Add the Floating WhatsApp button with the link: https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=917735537655
Ensure the Footer contains placeholder Phone, Email, Address if not provided in detail.
CRITICAL: Do not use gradient text on dark backgrounds if it reduces readability. Solid Gold (#FFD700) is better.
Use the `texture_bg` as a subtle background for the About or Contact section with low opacity overlay.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Micro-interactions on every button and link.
Ensure high contrast (Gold on Black is good, but check grey text).
Mobile responsiveness is paramount. Images must stack correctly.
